hits.name: Nat.add_comm
hits.type: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n + m = m + n
hits.doc: Addition is commutative for natural numbers.

hits.name: Nat.add_left_comm
hits.type: ∀ (n m k : ℕ), n + (m + k) = m + (n + k)

hits.name: Nat.add_right_comm
hits.type: ∀ (n m k : ℕ), n + m + k = n + k + m

hits.name: Int.add_comm
hits.type: ∀ (a b : ℤ), a + b = b + a
